Title: DROP ALL LOADER
Description: Remove all user-defined loader functions which share the same name but have different signatures.

Note : This command is MonetDB specific.
Use option CASCADE to specify to also drop referencing objects.
See also: DROP LOADER , CREATE LOADER .
Associated system table: sys.functions where type = 7 and language > 2.
Examples:
DROP ALL LOADER [ FUNCTION ] [
schema_name
'.' ]
function_name
[ RESTRICT | CASCADE ]
